hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); [[ "$cmd" =~ git[[:space:]]+commit ]] && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"MANDATORY CHECKLIST (CLAUDE.md) before committing: 1) Tests written and passing for any new/changed module? 2) src/main/help/help_* updated? 3) README.md Features section updated? 4) KNOWN_ISSUES.md in sync? Do NOT proceed with the commit until all applicable items are confirmed.\"}}" || true'
